team.createHint: Welcome, {{name}}! Create a team to start managing tasks. You will become its leader.
team.name: Team name
team.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete "{{team}}" and all its tasks, comments and files? This cannot be undone.

tasks.title: Title
tasks.proposeHint: You have no active task — tell your team what you're doing.
tasks.proposeModalHint: Describe what you are working on. A leader will confirm it as a task.
tasks.descriptionHint: Add the details here — keep the title short.
tasks.proposeNote: You are adding a task — it will await your leader's approval before it appears for the team.

employees.title: Team members
employees.passwordHint: Leave empty to keep the current password
employees.addNewHint: Creates a brand-new account in this team
employees.addExistingHint: Add someone who already has an account by username
employees.removeConfirm: Remove this member from the team?
employees.labelsHint: Specialization labels for members, e.g. Backend developer.

tags.title: Tags
tags.name: Name
tags.empty: No tags yet. Create tags and pick them when creating a task.

invite.title: Invite links
invite.hint: Anyone with the link can join this team. Links expire in 7 days.

join.title: Join a team
join.authHint: Sign in or create an account to accept the invitation.
join.hint: You are invited to join "{{team}}" as {{role}}.
join.alreadyMember: You are already a member of "{{team}}".
join.chooseTitle: Join a team or create your own
join.chooseHint: If your team already exists, ask to join it. Otherwise create your own workspace.
join.requestHint: Search for an existing team and send a request to its leader.
join.searchHint: Type at least 2 letters to search teams
join.requestSent: Request sent — a leader will review it.
join.goOwnTeamHint: Create your own workspace if you are starting a new team.

stats.title: Monthly statistics
stats.noActive: No one is working right now

comments.title: Comments
comments.addPlaceholder: Add a comment... Use @username to mention someone

account.deleteWarning: This deactivates your account and removes your personal data. Teams where you are the only member are deleted. This cannot be undone.

hero.title: Run your team's work in one calm place
hero.subtitle: Assign tasks, track them on a kanban board, see who's doing what, and get monthly reports — with a Telegram bot your team already lives in.
hero.note: No credit card. Set up your team in minutes.

landing.featuresTitle: Everything your team needs to ship work
landing.featuresSubtitle: From the first task to the monthly report — in one place.

board.title: Kanban board
board.desc: Open → In progress → In review → Done. Move work forward and see the whole picture at a glance.

teams.title: Teams & roles
teams.desc: Leaders, managers and members — each with the right permissions. One account, many teams.

stats.title: Live statistics
stats.desc: Who's working on what right now, on-time rates, a monthly timeline and a task-distribution overview.

bot.title: Telegram bot
bot.desc: Take, complete and get notified about tasks right inside Telegram — where your team already is.

comments.title: Comments & files
comments.desc: Discuss tasks with @mentions, markdown and image attachments stored on S3.

reports.title: Monthly PDF report
reports.desc: Auto-generated: tasks done, overdue work and the employee of the month.

landing.howTitle: Up and running in three steps

one.title: Create your team
one.desc: Sign up and spin up a team in seconds.

two.title: Add members & assign
two.desc: Invite people, give them a role and assign the first tasks.

three.title: Track & report
three.desc: Watch progress on the board and get a monthly PDF automatically.

landing.ctaTitle: Ready to get your team organized?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join teams already running their work with a calmer, clearer system.

telegram.reminderText: Get task notifications and manage your work right from Telegram.
telegram.title: Connect Telegram
telegram.connectedHint: You'll get task notifications in Telegram and can take or complete tasks there.
telegram.intro: Take tasks, get notified and comment — right inside Telegram, where your team already is.
telegram.step1DeepLink: Tap “Open bot in Telegram”, then press Start in the chat.
telegram.step2DeepLink: Your account links automatically — that's it.
telegram.step1Manual: Open Telegram and start a chat with the HR bot.
telegram.step2Manual: Send the code below to the bot to link your account.
telegram.orUseCode: Or link manually with this code
telegram.stillNotLinked: Not linked yet — press Start in the bot first.
